mapper.sql: id, data_source, insert_type, create_time, modify_time, conf, partition_list
mapper.insert: insert into writer_hive (id, data_source, insert_type, create_time, modify_time, conf, partition_list) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dataSource,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler}, #{insertType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{partitionList,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into writer_hive
id,
data_source,
insert_type,
create_time,
modify_time,
conf,
partition_list,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{dataSource,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler},
#{insertType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{partitionList,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update writer_hive
data_source = #{dataSource,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler},
insert_type = #{insertType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
conf = #{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
partition_list = #{partitionList,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update writer_hive set data_source = #{dataSource,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler}, insert_type = #{insertType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, conf = #{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, partition_list = #{partitionList,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
